ideation: This sequence simulates a singer holding a microphone. The left arm is up and out, as if holding the mic. The right arm is bent at the elbow (simulated by the robot's shoulder joints), as if gesturing expressively. The sequence begins with a relaxed pose (frame 1), transitions to the singer holding the mic (frame 2), then adds a slight upward movement of the right arm (frame 3), followed by a return to a more relaxed pose (frame 4), and finally, a subtle adjustment of the left arm (frame 5).

frames.beat: both arms hang relaxed at the sides
left arm holds the mic, right arm bent in anticipation
right arm gestures upward with the song
arms settle slightly, the song continues
left arm adjusts its grip on the microphone
